proposal1.heroHeadline: Blast is burning $50,000 a year on proposal inefficiencies. Here is exactly where it goes.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Manually crafting design proposals eats hours. Automate with 47-second precision and reclaim your time.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Every day, inefficiencies drain resources and potential revenue.

problems.title: Time Sinkhole
problems.description: Each proposal takes 4 hours to compile. With 50 proposals annually, that's 200 hours lost. Hours not spent on design or client engagement.

problems.title: Design Focus Drift
problems.description: Manual proposals pull key designers away from creative work. Every hour on proposals is an hour not spent enhancing Blast's design offerings.

problems.title: Inconsistency Costs Deals
problems.description: Inconsistent branding in proposals confuses potential clients. This inconsistency can lead to lost contracts and damaged reputation.

problems.title: Delayed Responses
problems.description: Slow proposal turnaround frustrates clients. In a fast-paced industry, delays cost Blast potential clients who expect quick responses.

problems.title: Human Error Risks
problems.description: Manual entry invites errors. Each mistake in a proposal can compromise a deal, risking thousands in potential revenue.

problems.title: Tracking Inefficiencies
problems.description: Lack of tracking leads to missed follow-ups. Without knowing who opened a proposal or when, opportunities slip through the cracks.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system transforms these losses into gains.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, creating proposals is a 4-hour ordeal. Our system generates them in under a minute, freeing up valuable time.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual branding is inconsistent. Our system ensures every proposal aligns perfectly with Blast's brand identity.

solutions.title: Real-Time Tracking
solutions.description: No tracking means missed opportunities. With our system, know when proposals are opened and engage clients timely.

solutions.title: Error-Free Proposals
solutions.description: Manual proposals risk errors. Our AI ensures every document is accurate, reducing costly mistakes.

solutions.title: Rapid Client Response
solutions.description: Slow responses frustrate clients. Our system enables near-instant proposal delivery, enhancing client satisfaction.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Blast's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Blast around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Blast.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Revitalize Acme Corp with Blast's Expert Design Solutions.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Our plan will streamline your design process and elevate brand presence. Let’s transform your assets into business drivers.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently experiencing critical losses due to these issues.

problems.title: Low Conversion Rate
problems.description: Every visitor who leaves your site without converting is revenue walking out the door. Current rates indicate a 20% gap in potential earnings.

problems.title: Outdated Branding
problems.description: A dated brand image is costing you market relevance and client trust, leading to a 15% decrease in client retention.

problems.title: Inefficient Design Workflow
problems.description: Losses in productivity and increased project timelines are resulting in a 10% decline in overall project output.

problems.title: Poor User Experience
problems.description: An underwhelming user experience is pushing potential clients away, causing a 25% drop in customer engagement.

problems.title: Inconsistent Visual Identity
problems.description: Inconsistency in your visual identity is reducing brand recognition by 30%, impacting your market position.

problems.title: Lack of Cross-Platform Cohesion
problems.description: A disjointed approach across platforms is eroding your brand’s coherence, leading to a 12% fall in cross-channel effectiveness.

proposal2.solutionIntro: To address these losses, we propose tailored solutions that leverage Blast's expertise.

solutions.title: Brand Design
solutions.description: We will refresh your brand identity to boost recognition and trust. This will directly address outdated branding and visual inconsistency.

solutions.title: Web Development
solutions.description: Enhancing your website to improve user experience and conversion rates, resulting in increased client engagement.

solutions.title: Cross-Platform Strategy
solutions.description: Develop a cohesive strategy to unify your brand across all platforms, enhancing market presence and effectiveness.

solutions.title: Workflow Optimization
solutions.description: Streamlining your design processes to increase productivity and reduce project timelines, solving inefficiency issues.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Blast is uniquely positioned to elevate Acme Corp through our expert design services.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Expertise
whyUsCards.description: Our track record in transforming brands speaks for itself. We deliver exceptional results every time.

whyUsCards.title: Attention to Detail
whyUsCards.description: We ensure every aspect of your project is meticulously crafted to align with your brand vision.

whyUsCards.title: Agile Processes
whyUsCards.description: Our agile approach allows us to adapt quickly to your needs, ensuring timely and effective solutions.

whyUsCards.title: Client-Centric Approach
whyUsCards.description: We prioritize your goals and work collaboratively to achieve unparalleled success.

proposal2.ctaDescription: We're here to discuss how we can help your business grow. No commitments needed.

lead.company_description:
We create and re-define brands, using intelligent creativity to help our clients stand out and communicate better. We believe in the power of great ideas and the difference that good design can make.

Formed in 1996, we're a leading independent brand communications consultancy based in London. We work for a wide variety of clients, large and small, in a range of sectors which include the arts, media, education, manufacturing and property. We create original, innovative design which has won awards for both creativity and effectiveness.

We develop brand personalities, create brand identities and communicate them through print, digital, campaigns, exhibitions, events and environments. We manage the whole process including strategic planning, design, implementation, production and delivery.
lead.headline: Helping Brands Stand Out With Big Ideas, Intelligent Creativity & Beautifully Crafted Design
lead.company_technologies: ai, basis, campaignmonitor, digitalocean, docker, gmail, google analytics, google apps, google maps, google tag manager, intuit, mobile friendly, nginx, python, vimeo, wordpress.org
